name: Nine Mile Metals Ltd.
description: Nine Mile Metals Ltd. (CSE: NINE) is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of critical mineral properties. The company is primarily active in the world-renowned Bathurst Mining Camp in New Brunswick, Canada, where it holds multiple projects, including the flagship Nine Mile Brook VMS project. Nine Mile Metals explores for high-grade deposits of copper, lead, zinc, silver, and gold. Headquartered in Vancouver, the company is committed to advancing its mineral assets through strategic exploration and development to unlock value within its prospective project portfolio.
